mapper.select:
SELECT company_id ,yyyymm ,stl_type ,create_id ,stlCount ,GET_ADMIN_USER_NM(create_id) as createNm ,GET_COMPANY_NM(company_id) as companyNm FROM ( SELECT company_id ,yyyymm ,stl_type ,create_id ,count(1) stlCount FROM tb_stl_settlement_mng WHERE 1=1
GROUP by company_id,yyyymm,stl_type,create_id ) B ORDER BY company_id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{recordSize}
SELECT count(1) FROM tb_stl_settlement_mng a LEFT OUTER JOIN tb_mbm_admin_user b ON a.create_id = b.id LEFT OUTER JOIN tb_mbm_admin_user c ON a.modified_id = c.id WHERE 1=1

SELECT
FROM tb_stl_settlement_mng a WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_stl_settlement_mng ( company_id, yyyymm, stl_type, mno, network, plan_name, data_plan, basic_fee, discount_amount, discount_period, applicant, contact_number, activation_date, create_id, modified_id ) VALUES ( #{companyId}, #{yyyymm}, #{stlType}, #{mno}, #{network}, #{planName}, #{dataPlan}, #{basicFee}, #{discountAmount}, #{discountPeriod}, #{applicant}, #{contactNumber}, #{activationDate}, #{createId}, #{modifiedId} );
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_stl_settlement_mng SET company_id=#{companyId}, yyyymm=#{yyyymm}, stl_type=#{stlType}, mno=#{mno}, network=#{network}, plan_name=#{planName}, data_plan=#{dataPlan}, basic_fee=#{basicFee}, discount_amount=#{discountAmount}, discount_period=#{discountPeriod}, applicant=#{applicant}, contact_number=#{contactNumber}, activation_date=#{activationDate}, modified_id=#{modifiedId}, modified_date=NOW() WHERE id=#{id};
